Metadata.title: Luxury Retreat - Premium Short-Term Rental
Metadata.description: Experience an unforgettable stay at our premium short-term rental. Perfect location, modern amenities, and comfort guaranteed.

Hero.title: Your perfect getaway awaits
Hero.description: Experience luxury and comfort in the heart of the city. Book your stay today and create unforgettable memories.

Features.title: Everything you need
Features.description: We've thoughtfully designed every detail to ensure you have a comfortable and memorable stay.

wifi.title: High-Speed WiFi
wifi.description: Stay connected with our premium 500Mbps fiber internet connection.

kitchen.title: Full Kitchen
kitchen.description: Fully equipped with modern appliances and everything you need.

ac.title: Air Conditioning
ac.description: Individual climate control in every room for your comfort.

parking.title: Free Parking
parking.description: Secure, off-street parking available during your entire stay.

pool.title: Swimming Pool
pool.description: Access to our pristine swimming pool and lounge area.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.description: Dedicated desk and ergonomic chair for remote workers.

Gallery.title: Take a tour
Gallery.description: Explore the beautiful spaces designed for your comfort and relaxation.

Testimonials.title: What our guests say
Testimonials.description: Read about the experiences of people who have stayed with us.

Location.title: Perfectly situated
Location.description: Located in a safe, quiet neighborhood just minutes away from top attractions.

BookingCTA.title: Ready to book your stay?
BookingCTA.description: Contact us on WhatsApp to check availability and secure your reservation.
BookingCTA.whatsappText: Hello! I'm interested in booking the property.
